name: vitepress-plugin-depthindex
description: On-device intelligence layer for VitePress documentation — offline-first AI search engine

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/client/index-loader.ts src/client/search-engine.ts src/client/query-processor.ts src/client/cloud-adapter.ts src/client/personalization.ts src/client/pwa-handler.ts src/client/session-manager.ts src/client/conversation-handler.ts src/client/page-context.ts src/client/renderers.ts src/client/performance.ts src/client/search-worker.ts src/client/error-handler.ts src/client/security.ts src/config/env.ts src/client/legal-notices.ts src/client/pii-detector.ts src/build/compliance-generator.ts src/client/answer-synthesizer.ts src/build/seo-optimizer.ts src/build/meta-injector.ts src/build/free-domain-seo.ts src/client/branding.ts src/client/icons.ts src/client/site-context.ts src/client/site-intelligence.ts src/client/intent-engine.ts src/client/suggestion-engine.ts src/client/search-modes.ts src/sdk/index.ts src/sdk/compliance.ts src/extensions/i18n/index.ts src/extensions/cloud/index.ts src/build/delta-indexer.ts src/client/secure-updater.ts src/client/device-adapter.ts src/client/cloud-knowledge.ts --dts --format esm,cjs --external vue,vitepress --clean && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/styles', {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/styles/search-bar.css', 'dist/styles/search-bar.css'); fs.copyFileSync('src/styles/tokens.css', 'dist/styles/tokens.css');"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run audit
scripts.docs:build: npm run build && vitepress build docs

author: Eldrex Delos Reyes Bula <eldrexdelosreyesbula@gmail.com>
